description: A builder template for classifying a customer support request, selecting a policy and routing the ticket to the right team.
default_query: Customer says the delivery is late and asks whether the order can be refunded.

node_palette.name: Support Request Parser Node
node_palette.role: Extract issue keywords, customer intent and available ticket context.

node_palette.name: Support Question Node
node_palette.role: Ask for missing issue details before routing the ticket.

node_palette.name: Ticket Classification Node
node_palette.role: Classify the ticket category by matching local policy keywords.

node_palette.name: Policy Lookup Node
node_palette.role: Load the local support policy for the matched ticket category.

node_palette.name: Routing Decision Node
node_palette.role: Decide ticket owner, priority and next actions from classification and policy.

node_palette.name: Support Compose Node
node_palette.role: Render the ticket summary, routing decision and response draft.

clarification_questions.issue_text: Please describe the customer issue before routing the ticket.
